_comment: Ad account management - overview stats cards.

keyword.description: Same keyword rule as table API.

appId.description: App filter; cockpit appOptions[].value. Empty string means all.

platform.description: Terminal platform filter; cockpit platformOptions[].value. Empty string means all.

source.description: Ad platform filter; cockpit sourceOptions[].value. Empty string means all.

status.description: Status filter. Empty string means all.

platformCount.description: Distinct ad platform (source) count under current filters.

notes: Use exactly the same filter scope as table API.
Return all numeric fields as 0 when there is no data.

triggers.detail: Load stats together with table data on page enter.
Reload when keyword or filters change.

interaction.defaultSelection: Default filters are the same as table API.
interaction.dedupe: Use the latest request result when requests overlap.
